programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Nile: An African Odyssey
programme.desc: The Nile is the longest river in the world. Ancient Egypt, one of the history's most powerful civilizations, depended hugely upon it. Each year, it flooded, replenishing the fields with fertile silt. This automatic irrigation fueled Egypt's economy.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
programme.desc: It's home to some of the world's most iconic animals  including the African great apes.
programme.sub-title: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: WWII Beaufighters
programme.desc: A dogfight lasting a mere 15 minutes over Norwegian fields during WWII. 60 years later, the fjords still guard the secrets of the ten allied planes that were shot down. It is now one of the most important sites in aviation archaeology.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Shipwreck Treasure
programme.desc: Treasure hunters scour the ocean floor in search of shipwrecks and lost riches. The waters off the Florida Keys still hold some of these riches, even a king’s ransom, just waiting to be found.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Sunken Cities
programme.desc: Cities swept into the sea, civilizations lost beneath the waves, but is Atlantis more than a myth? Are there real sunken cities waiting to be discovered? Today, new technology is helping to find lost societies around the globe.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Wrecksploitation
programme.desc: There are more than 3,000,000 shipwrecks in the world, each one with a unique story. The age-old battle between treasure hunters and archaeologists continues to rage as more and more of these wrecks are uncovered.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert feels trapped - with no father present and an eccentric family to care for, he is struggling to cope. Despite the hardships Gilbert perseveres, but will he be able to live his own life?

programme.title: Alpha Dog
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, Alpha Dog follows three fateful days when the lives of a group of Southern California teens suddenly dead-ended. The film features a powerful ensemble cast including Sharon Stone, Justin Timberlake, Anton Yelchin and Bruce Willis.

programme.title: Animal Factory
programme.desc: A young man goes to prison and a tough, older convict takes him under his wing as a mentor.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Corpse Vanishes
programme.desc: In the theater, Joel and the Bots get the third installment of "Radar Men from the Moon" before the Bela Lugosi film "The Corpse Vanishes".

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Girl in Gold Boots
programme.desc: A girl from rural California goes to Los Angeles to work as a go-go dancer, but soon gets involved with drug dealers.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Manhunt In Space: An early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital plus a movie made of several TV episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Castle of Fu Manchu
programme.desc: The Castle of Fu Manchu tries to conquer the world by turning all water into ice.

programme.title: RiffTrax: House on Haunted Hill: Three Riffer Edition
programme.desc: Long before lunatic millionaires Michael Jackson or Rick Rockwell, there was Vincent Price's Frederic Loren, an eccentric, unhappily married fop who offers a huge cash prize to anyone who can stay overnight in the house on Haunted Hill.
programme.sub-title: House on Haunted Hill: Three Riffer Edition

programme.title: RiffTrax: Brainiac
programme.desc: Back in 1661, a Spanish baron in the middle of burning at the stake escaped by hitching a ride on a passing comet, as one does. And now he returns, 300 years later, a shapeshifting monstrosity bent on killing the descendants of those who wronged him as Th

programme.title: RiffTrax: Planet of Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Planet of Dinosaurs: When a spaceship full of hairy people crashes on an unknown planet, they must forge off on a non-stop mission of wandering around doing nothing in particular.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 6: Brazilian Bigfoot
programme.desc: From the stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 comes RiffTrax, hilarious audio commentaries for your favorite - and not-so-favorite - movies!

programme.title: Frankenstein Island
programme.desc: Directed by B-Movie "icon" Jerry Warren, this is a riffing journey you don't want to miss. And so with great trepidation, Mike, Kevin and Bill hop into a hot air balloon and head off into the wild blue yonder to riff Frankenstein Island!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: King Neptune's Court
programme.desc: While off jogging, King Neptune spots the mermaid and falls head over heels in love with her. Marina is rather flattered...but as far as Sharko is concerned, no way is that Don Juan of the seas going to hang around his beloved mermaid!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Cold Snap
programme.desc: A snow storm hits the island and pretty soon, everything is frozen over. An ice floe has even formed in the lagoon, isolating Marina's rock. Since Sharko is stuck in the ice, Zig is home free in order to nab his mermaid! But someone has the same idea…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Father in Law
programme.desc: Poseidon comes to visit his daughter. Sharko is under pressure to make a good impression. But Poseidon doesn't think the shark is worthy of his daughter. Sharko is devastated. Zig and Bernie offer to help him…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: VeggieZig
programme.desc: Bernie - disheartened by Zig's ever-ridiculous, vain attempts to catch the mermaid - resolves to put an end to such pathetic demonstrations. With Sharko, he decides to use a pendulum to hypnotise Zig, and persuade him to go vegetarian…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Spick and Span
programme.desc: It's cleaning day in the castle! Zig and Bernie take advantage to offer their services as cleaners... And if Sharko wants to protect Marina he'll have to do some cleaning too!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Beach Hero
programme.desc: Zig unintentionally rescues a little crab lost on the beach. He's a hero for Marina and all the beach people! Sharko is not fooled...but Zig uses his popularity to reverse roles and make the shark look like the bad guy!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Marina decides to teach a class on the beach! Zig decides to enroll in her school. Sharko quickly joins the class too! The duo starts to compete for the teacher's attention, but for very different reasons…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko
programme.desc: After a combination of circumstances, Zig manages to EAT the mermaid! Sharko is devastated, but learns that Hades has a remote device, which means you can revert time! How far must he rewind to bring his beloved back to life?

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Mermaid Fritter
programme.desc: Zig and Bernie come back from hunting empty-handed and a lot worse for wear. Bernie is fed up. He wants a quiet life. He comes up with a plan to convince Zig he has eaten the mermaid…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Bionic Zig
programme.desc: After picking up the pieces each time Zig tries to catch the mermaid, Bernie decides to 'reinforce' his friend. Presenting the new Bionic Zig! Zig is sure he's invincible and no longer fears Sharko: the mermaid shall be his!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: A Sweet Tooth
programme.desc: Marina is crazy for candy! Zig has found the ideal bait to lure her into his clutches! Sharko has his work cut out for him. He must protect his sweetheart while teaching her the basics of healthy eating.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Teen Rebels
programme.desc: Zig finds an old skateboard in a crate. It awakens memories, taking him back to when he, Bernie, Sharko and Marina were teenagers, and all they only cared about were stunts on wheels…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: The Mummy
programme.desc: A pyramid is discovered on the beach! Marina races inside. Zig and Sharko follow. Marina finds a chamber with a very friendly mummy, while Zig and Sharko get hammered by endless booby traps ...

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Bosom Buddies
programme.desc: Why are the hyena and the hermit crab such good friends? It turns out that in the past a would-be 'mama' raised them side by side…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Zig Top Chef
programme.desc: Sharko is a hopeless cook. He decides to train with the best chef on the island: Zig! They get busy with pots, pans, fresh ingredients and exotic herbs. Marina's right there, eager to taste every dish. But she's the one dish Zig wants to taste…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: High Wired
programme.desc: Marina aims to enter the Book of Records by tightrope-walking the longest distance ever. Sharko is terrified of heights... Zig sees an opportunity to nab the mermaid, beyond the shark's reach!

programme.desc: In this fire-themed episode, the contestants must face some of the hottest stunts yet, literally.
programme.sub-title: Fireboat Heli Net Climb, Fire Torch Toss and Drink, Fire Slide

programme.title: Fear Factor: Flying High, Junkyard Canine Attack, Vertical Bus Drop
programme.desc: Contestants are harnessed and locked into a computer ratchet system. Couples will make their way through junkyard obstacles, retrieving hubcaps. The male contestants will be standing on top of a bus while their female partners are strapped under the bus.
programme.sub-title: Flying High, Junkyard Canine Attack, Vertical Bus Drop

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tug Of War, Roach Cage Escape, Barrels Off Truck
programme.desc: It's age vs. youth in this special episode! Contestants will be sealed into a cage filled with roaches. The cage will be locked on the outside. Contestants will also drive behind a truck while their opponents are releasing barrels to distract them.
programme.sub-title: Tug Of War, Roach Cage Escape, Barrels Off Truck

programme.title: Fear Factor: Hurricane Ledge Walk, Roach Bob and Eat, Raging Waters
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouth. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.
programme.sub-title: Hurricane Ledge Walk, Roach Bob and Eat, Raging Waters

programme.title: Fear Factor: Body Weights, Picnic Basket, Train Drag
programme.desc: Special blind date episode! Couples will be presented with a picnic baskets filled with a Fear Factor style meal. One contestant will be underneath the train at the back of a car, while her partner will be on the side of the same car.
programme.sub-title: Body Weights, Picnic Basket, Train Drag

programme.title: Fear Factor: Pig Pen, Rotisserie Chicken In A Basket, Tractor Pull and Escape
programme.desc: Stunts takes place in a rectangular pig pen filled with pigs. A couple is placed back-to back and attached to an upright rotisserie. One contestant will be dragged through a field of mud.
programme.sub-title: Pig Pen, Rotisserie Chicken In A Basket, Tractor Pull and Escape

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine. High winds wreak havoc for Devan and his crew on another C-46 mission to help clean up an oil spill in the Northwest Territories.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Coming Home
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta. Mikey and Rod think they hit the jackpot when they buy a million dollar firefighting plane on eBay at a bargain price.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Dark Skies
programme.desc: When Yellowknife and the northern aviation community are rocked by three crashes within a month, Joe places an extra emphasis on safety, which is why he only trusts himself to perform a dangerous-looking DC-3 stunt landing for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Shut Down
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline. Ray and the Electra crew fly to Sachs Harbour to pick up a unique load - the hides, wool, and meat of 250 musk oxen.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac. City girl Christine moves to Yellowknife to give the unglamorous rampie life a shot.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north. But a series of problems with the Electra leave the company in a jam.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake. The ice strip landing goes fine, but when the plane takes off from the strip, the right landing gear gets stuck in the wheel well.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Search for the Legendary Striker!
programme.desc: The news that Axel is kicked off the team doesn’t go over well with most of the Raimon players, especially Kevin Dragonfly.
programme.sub-title: The Search for the Legendary Striker!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Prince of Snow Land!
programme.desc: Raimon are excited and surprised when they finally meet Shawn Frost, but is he really as good as everyone says? There’s only one way to find out, and that’s to play a game against him.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Who is the New Ace Striker?
programme.desc: Shawn Frost is officially part of the Raimon 11, but there are still some teamwork kinks to iron out.
programme.sub-title: Who is the New Ace Striker?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Alius Academy Attack!
programme.desc: Raimon have toughened up though their snowboard training and are ready to face Alius Academy one more time. But do they have what it takes to beat them?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Epsilon Attacks!
programme.desc: Just when everyone thought the earth had been saved, Alius Academy attack once more, but this time with Team Epsilon. These guys really mean business, and they’re beating up on a new school - Cloister Divinity in Kyoto.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Hidden Power!
programme.desc: After the crushing defeat of Cloister Divinity, Raimon step up to fill the hole, with Scotty the substitute helping out on Celia’s urging. The results are strange and disheartening, but also encouraging in one way.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Royal Academy’s Comeback - Part 1!
programme.desc: Looks like Team Raimon have a new member, in the form of Sneaky Scotty. They’ll need all the help they can get though, because Ray Dark is back on the scene, in an unfeasibly silly submarine-based soccer stadium.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Royal Academy’s Comeback Part 2!
programme.desc: Raimon are smack in the middle of a game against Royal Academy Redux, and Ray Dark has convinced its players to use any and every means to win; even if it means the destruction of their minds and bodies.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Last Wyvern Blizzard!
programme.desc: The Inazuma Caravan finally comes home to recharge their batteries and…train a whole lot more. They find out that everybody’s been training to help them, including some old enemies!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Erik Eagle in Serious Trouble!
programme.desc: No sooner do they arrive home, and they’re back on the road again - this time they’re heading to Osaka where it’s rumoured that Alius Academy have a base.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Dvalin’s Trap!
programme.desc: The team find that the Golden Glamour Girls’ secret training bunker under the amusement park is a great place to train, but where did it come from?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Epsilon - The Toughest Battle Yet!
programme.desc: The big game against Epsilon is here, and Raimon come out with all guns blazing! Will their guns be enough to turn back the alien scourge?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Grandpa’s Secret Trick!
programme.desc: Unexpected news about the existence of another David Evans notebook sends the team scurrying off to Fukuoka, where they meet one of Mark’s grandfather’s old friends, and someone who might just become Mark’s apprentice.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Other Majin the Hand!
programme.desc: The exhibition game between Raimon and Fauxshore Jr - AKA the battle of the goalies - is a knuckle biting affair. Both Mark and Darren are showing off their old moves and trying to learn new ones while a storm of shots rages around them.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Seismic Earthquake Shocker!
programme.desc: Just when Raimon were feeling confident, they get a wake up call in the form of a big slap in the face from Xavier and his Genesis team. Sure, part of being a winning team is being able to cope with loss, but a loss this big?

programme.title: Baroness Von Sketch Show
programme.desc: The all-female comedy series is created by and stars veteran Canadian actor Meredith MacNeill and Second City alumni Carolyn Taylor, Aurora Browne and Jennifer Whalen, who satirize modern life's everyday concerns.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly rushes to look for sperm donors when she finds out her biological clock is rounding midnight. The guys pledge to find her the perfect match—and who could be more perfect than themselves?

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly’s office crush Paul returns to work, and she is determined to find out how he feels about her once and for all.Stuart, sick of doing all the cleaning himself hires a maid, who quickly turns Haskell’s life upside down.
programme.sub-title: How Holly Got Her Groove Back

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: After giving Holly’s new boyfriend Paul a hard time, the guys make amends and Paul invites them to the party of a lifetime. But on the way, Stuart discovers that Paul’s ex-wife might still be in the picture.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Desperate to impress her perfect sister Jill, Holly invents an alternative lifestyle for herself that quickly spirals out of control. Meanwhile, the guys are riding high on a "special" dish cooked up by Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil's client, tennis star Chuck Feeney, stays with the guys to hide from the paparazzi. But Chuck the ladies' man turns out to be more of a man's man. Haskell and Holly compete over who can take better care of pregnant Eden.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang crashes a party on Phil's boss's yacht, where a very pregnant Eden goes into labor.
programme.sub-title: Pirates of the Care of Eden

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: The Man Who Sued God
programme.desc: Billy Connolly plays Steve Myers, a lawyer who became a fisherman from frustration. When his one piece of property, his boat, is struck by lightning and destroyed, he is denied insurance money because it was 'an act of God'. He re-registers as a lawyer.

programme.title: Unlikely Hero
programme.desc: A washed-up writer forms an unlikely friendship with a teenager from Long Island. Starring: Jeff Daniels, Emma Stone, Ryan Reynolds, Lisa Kudrow, Kieran Culkin

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: CarGO
programme.desc: A young car learns the importance of family when he embarks on a mission to rescue his father – who’s been sent to Clunker Island to be repurposed as junk metal.

programme.title: Monster
programme.desc: After a massive earthquake in Tokyo, two American filmmakers document the true cause of the destruction.

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy real estate broker falls in love with a younger man, who introduces her to BDSM. Using her newly awakened sexual prowess, she finally takes charge of her own life.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Middleton, Manchester to investigate claims that a sad cavalier named Edward is haunting this location. Ring O Bells has also been used for druid rituals. Will he be able to summon any spirits tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 2
programme.desc: As Sean continues his investigation at The Ring O Bells pub, he finds that out that there is more haunting this location, than just the spirits lurking behind the bar.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean investigates one of the UK's most haunted pubs, with is very own dungeon. Haunted by multiple spirits, it appears to be very active and Sean is not prepared for what happens to Paul.
programme.sub-title: Ghostly Dimension at Ye Olde Boars Head

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Ashton-Under-Lyne to investigate poltergeist activity claims in a local pub. It's believed that it's not just the locals that return to haunt here. Sean comes face to face with the activity in a night he will never forget.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at The Station Hotel and it appears his presence is not welcomed by the spirits. This is one experience of the paranormal that leaves a mark in Sean's memory forever.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to a haunted escape room attraction and although the sets are dressed to scare, something more sinister seems to be lurking here. Will Sean escape unscathed tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the escape rooms and investigates the haunted bible and radio. Prepare for a fright when Sean and Paul join forces and witness paranormal activity firsthand
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill
programme.desc: Sean heads into Stockport, Greater Manchester and travels to Welkin Mill. He investigates claims of paranormal activity which also appear to be linked to his previous investigation of Moviescape.
programme.sub-title: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Driven to Distraction
programme.desc: Archie buys a pair of mystical fuzzy dice for his beloved car, Betsy, and unwittingly brings her to life when he hangs the dice on her rearview mirror.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Attack of the 50-foot Veronica
programme.desc: Veronica treats Jughead like an outsider and excludes him from her guest list for a pool party she's throwing, on the basis that he's different.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Invisible Archie
programme.desc: In an effort to catch both Veronica and Betty's attention, Reggie attempts to steal some of Dilton's physique enhancing solution.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: The Haunting of Riverdale
programme.desc: Riverdale citizens are scared into a state of shock, being found clutching overdue library book notices.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: The Curse of the Mummy
programme.desc: Archie and Jughead get locked in the Riverdale museum with a mummy inexplicably determined to get revenge against our boy hero.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Fleas Release Me
programme.desc: When practical joker Reggie scares Archie with a wolfman mask, his prank backfires!

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Mega-Mall of Horrors
programme.desc: One night, a bright and glittering shopping mall mysteriously appears in Riverdale.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: The Jughead Incident
programme.desc: Government agents are convinced by Jughead's eccentric behavior that he is an advance scout for an alien invasion fleet.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Virtually Evil
programme.desc: Evil monsters from a virtual reality game break out and materialize in Riverdale!

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Zombies of Love
programme.desc: Veronica doesn't think that Archie dotes on her enough, so she visits a witchy woman who gives her a magic potion.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Brain of Terror
programme.desc: Moose is close to being cut from the football team unless he is able to bring his grades up.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Twisted Youth
programme.desc: Archie and the gang get a taste of what it's like to deal with teenagers when Mr. Weatherbee, Mr. Lodge and Miss Grundy drink bottles of contaminated water, causing them to revert to their wild teenage selves.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Compu-Terror
programme.desc: Archie is temporarily unable to type, so Reggie offers to write the Weird Mystery article for the school paper.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Monster in the Night
programme.desc: A monstrous man of incredible strength is making evening appearances in Riverdale.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Misfortune Hunters
programme.desc: Betty begins to mysteriously receive fortune cookies that instruct her to carry out simple good deeds each of which leads to a reward.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Jade weighs just five and half stone, and is desperate to regain her pre-pregnancy size for the sake of her young son. Julie, binges on huge platefuls of home cooked food.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Thirty-eight-year old Emma Frost is a stubborn calorie counting health enthusiast who weighs in at just over six stone. Scott Hastie is now 25 and a half stone and in danger of health problems.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Binge eater Wayne swaps diets with fussy eater Lucia. And Anna Richardson tries tower running, ultrasound and infra red, as she bids to get herself a perfect pair of legs.

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Victoria
programme.desc: A super-stressed, over-scheduled, sweet-aholic mother of two, 39-year-old Victoria uses food the way others abuse drugs. Gillian vows to get her feeling sexy again…But can this portly parent get by without comfort eating?

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Lia
programme.desc: With her non-stop cravings, 40-year-old Lia’s waistline has ballooned. And at 5’3” and 210 pounds, she’s feeling lazy, lumpy, and lousy. She says she’s desperate for a change… But will she dig deep to make it happen?

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Denise
programme.desc: Denise’s dismal diet is dimming her mojo and destroying her health. The busy mother of four wants her once-buff body back. But will she stick to Gillian’s plan? And can she convince the whole family that change is good?

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Erika
programme.desc: A stressed out, overworked, carb- and sugar-junkie, 46-year-old Erika is clinically obese, suffers from type-2 diabetes, and is disgusted by her bulging body.

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Jennifer
programme.desc: Booze-binging Jen dreams of being a sexy, confident siren…But at 5’9” and 225 lbs, the soda sipping, junk food junkie is clinically obese, her mojo is MIA, and she’s worried her new boyfriend will eventually tire of making love in the dark.

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Annalisa
programme.desc: With her cake-a-day habit and constant craving for pickles, pop, and pasta, 34-year-old Annalisa’s 5’5” frame has ballooned to 215 lbs. And although the once svelte mother of two can’t stand the skin she’s in,

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Frances
programme.desc: Bulging bride-to-be Frances dreams of wowing her groom when she walks down the aisle. But at 5’9”, and 330 pounds, the 28-year-old is miserable and morbidly obese, and would rather order take out than make out.

programme.title: Bizarre E.R. Series: Episode 9
programme.desc: A butcher is impaled on a meat hook. A woman breaks her hip killing a wasp. A gardener's fingers are lacerated by a lawnmower. Medics save a scalped man.

programme.title: Bizarre E.R. Series: Episode 10
programme.desc: A sow charges a pig handler. A trumpeter takes off the top of her finger with a bike chain. A pensioner mistakes olbas oil for eye drops. A man has his scalp shaved off after a car crash.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 17
programme.desc: We visit a picturesque cottage in Newquay that draws plenty of attention at auction. In Stockport, there's an office block up for auction which could be great and in Kent, there's a three bedroom end terrace house in a good area.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 33
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts visit a property in Hyde, Greater Manchester which could net someone a big profit, a South London terrace house with tardis like qualities and a mid terrace house in Chippenham, Wiltshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 21
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a log cabin in Cornwall, a basement studio flat in Kent and a three bedroom terrace in Liverpool. All these properties are up for auction and we will be finding out who buys them when they go Under The Hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy see properties in Ripon and Dover.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a property in Wales, a cottage in Kent and a big house with a problem in Ripon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a one-bedroom terrace in Kent, a holiday cottage on the coast of Norfolk and a bland property in London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a three-bed semi in South London, a flat in Gravesend and a house in Plymouth.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: On a faraway planet where blue giants rule, oppressed humanoids rebel against their machine-like leaders.

programme.title: Snowballing
programme.desc: The Monroe High School senior class have a wild time on their skiing vacation. Eager to hit the slopes and enter the resort's skiing competition, the students' plans turn into something treacherous.

programme.title: Confessions of A Sex Maniac
programme.desc: A sex-crazed young architect decides that he wants to design a building shaped like the perfect breast, so he searches all over London for a woman who bears the perfect model.

programme.title: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair
programme.desc: Twin British sex-bombs Mary Millington and Rosemary England take on an astrologer who can bed women as easily as he can read fortunes! No-one goes home a Virgo - and Diana Dors adds to the glam!

programme.title: Flour Power: Around the World
programme.desc: Talented baker Jessica McGovern takes us around the world with diverse desserts from countries like Japan and Germany.

programme.title: Crate to Plate: Morels
programme.desc: In the stark ruins of a remote forest fire, morel mushrooms sprout in the ashes. Watch their journey across thousands of miles from forest to feast.

programme.title: Crate to Plate: Asparagus
programme.desc: From seed to stalk, from farm to table – watch the passionate story of how organic asparagus travels from a family farm in Ontario to a backyard BBQ.

programme.title: Crate to Plate: Cranberries
programme.desc: Millions of pounds of cranberries start their global journey from a Nova Scotia farm. Watch one batch make their way from field to Thanksgiving feast.

programme.title: Crate to Plate: Spot Prawns
programme.desc: From the cool clear blue waters of Vancouver to a beachside grill, watch the harrowing journey of a highly sought-after spot prawn.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30: Pizza Night
programme.desc: What’s fun for the whole family? Pizza night! Chef Spencer Watts makes two easy, budget-friendly pizzas for a delicious family-style meal.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30: Curry in a Hurry Night
programme.desc: Indian meals are the epitome of a full family dinner. Host Spencer Watts uses bold flavours to make classic Butter Chicken and refreshing Mango Lassi.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30: Taco Night
programme.desc: Have a fun, inexpensive, 30-minute fiesta in the kitchen with chef Spencer Watts’ favourite taco night recipes.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Martini Birthday
programme.desc: It’s Kathy’s 29th birthday (again!) and Rob goes all-martini in his bbq menu. He puts together everything from a martini marinated salmon on cedar plank with a tarragon mayo to a martini marinated leg of lamb. It’s a neat BBQ with a twist!

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The BBQ For No Reason
programme.desc: You don’t always need a special occasion to have people over for a bbq. Just lots of sun, food and friends! Rob prepares some staples – grilled chicken and ribs with garlic grilled tomatoes on the side.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Parents Night Out
programme.desc: Rob’s friends haven’t been out since the birth of their first child six weeks ago. In celebration of their first night out, Rob goes all out with a shellfish fiesta.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Baseball Pulled Pork
programme.desc: Rob and the boys have a victory dinner of pulled pork, grilled pork tenderloin with great sauces and smokey south western rice as a side after a successful day at the softball tournament.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Nothing But Chicken
programme.desc: Rob demonstrates how to do chicken up with style on the grill. He and his friends enjoy a poultry feast with BBQ rotisserie chicken, grilled flattened chicken and delicious smoked sides.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Blind Date and Garlic
programme.desc: The girls set Robs lifelong bachelor buddy up on a blind date and Rob decides to bbq mega garlic. Grilled veggies with garlic anchovy dip, grilled trout wrapped in Proscuitto with a roasted garlic mayo and a fresh nicoise salad.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: New neighbors move in across the street all the way from Southern Italy and Rob decides to do an all-Mediterranean bbq dinner in their honour. Hot of the grill are octopus, sardines and Moroccan lamb kabobs along with some mouthwatering sides.

programme.title: Hunter: The Jade Woman
programme.desc: When Hunter helps a distressed war buddy look for the kidnappers of his mail-order bride, the investigation leads Hunter and McCall to murder and double-cross.

programme.title: Hunter: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Racial tensions mount as Hunter and McCall investigate the accidental shooting by the police of Antonio Elandro, the son of a Hispanic councilman.

programme.title: Hunter: Night on Bald Mountain
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall spend a frightening night in a remote mansion with a family of murder suspects.

programme.title: Hunter: City of Passion - Part 1
programme.desc: Erik Estrada guest stars as a tough-minded detective who joins Hunter and McCall to catch a serial rapist while also investigating the disappearance of a teenage prostitute.

programme.title: Hunter: City of Passion - Part 2
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as Big Foot stalks McCall while Hunter investigates the death of a teenage prostitute who may have had ties to a Satanic cult.

programme.title: Hunter: City of Passion - Part 3
programme.desc: McCall risks losing her job when she fails to report a felony and Hunter tries to trap the killer of a teenage prostitute with possible ties to a Satanic cult.

programme.title: Hunter: The Turning Point
programme.desc: When Hunter and McCall investigate the alleged death of a reporter, they uncover an extortion plot involving a wealthy industrialist who has illicit dealings with a construction firm.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society. But a very special horror is reserved for women who will kill their own.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Love

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target

programme.desc: A mother and daughter both believe their house is haunted. But while the mother believes it's the spirit of her murdered boyfriend, her daughter believes it's much darker. Paranormal experts investigate and uncover an epic battle between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunted Cabinet
programme.desc: After James Hilton and his girlfriend Sandy bring an antique cabinet into their home, they capture actual video evidence proving it’s haunted. Sandy fears the entity from the cabinet is taking James over and turns to paranormal investigators for aid.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Fury
programme.desc: Shortly after Alicia and Scott Cain move into a farmhouse in the quiet Ohio countryside, they learn their home was the site of a brutal murder decades earlier. Plagued by the ghosts of this horrific event, they call in the Fourman Brothers to investigate.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Dreams
programme.desc: A nightmare starts when Chris starts renovating his family dream house. A ghost haunts the home. Only with the help of paranormal investigators, priests, psychics, and shamans does Chris figure out a way to protect his family and "evict" the evil spirit.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Alexis Burke

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Southern Organs

programme.title: IFISH: Alexandra, Victoria

programme.title: IFISH: Cullen Bay, Northern Territory

programme.title: IFISH: Mornington, Victoria
programme.desc: There's nothing quite like getting back to basics and garfish off the local pier - that's what I love! Learn all the tricks, to ensure you too can grab a feed down your local and even cook them up like a Master Chef!

programme.title: 24 Hour Rod Race: Magnificent Seven

programme.title: Final 24

programme.title: Final 24

programme.title: Final 24

programme.title: Style In Steel: Ghosts In The Machine

programme.title: Style In Steel: The Good, The Bad And The Ugly

programme.sub-title: The Good, The Bad And The Ugly

programme.title: Style In Steel: Rare Breeds
programme.desc: Automotive engineers and designers didn’t always work exclusively for big-name car manufacturers and the result was an eclectic mix of safety-last engineering in the FastBack, Mopar-big personalities, the Graham Blue Streak.

programme.title: Style In Steel: Buying, Driving, And Living
programme.desc: A collector’s car choices don’t always have a logical reason behind them, and car detective Bill Sherk thinks he knows why…

programme.title: Style In Steel: The Innovators
programme.desc: Citroen, Bentley, and Packard Motor Company were some of the biggest names in automotive manufacturing, but World War II and its economic aftermath would have relegated companies and cars alike to obscurity

programme.title: Style In Steel: The Last In A Line
programme.desc: Car fashions change almost as quickly as car collecting trends, the last car in Pierce Arrow’s assembly line, proves just as coveted as a short-run experimental Cadillac Roadster, both beautifully restored…

programme.title: Style In Steel: Smoke And Mirrors
programme.desc: Show off cars have been around for as long as there have been show-offs… and the two often find themselves together

programme.title: Style In Steel: Innovation During Tough Times
programme.desc: Race cars like the early modified Model-T’s and Ford’s first trucks, Model A Roadsters, have an unexpected common ancestry…

programme.desc: Steve turns a 1960s Wolsey into a dream machine, driving it in a race that he has a personal connection to. Meanwhile, the Dreamers must source dozens of cars for a TV action stunt.

programme.title: Banger Boys

programme.title: Banger Boys

programme.desc: Jed takes the family on a sight seeing tour of Beverly Hills to cool a feud between Granny and Pearl.

programme.desc: Two of Pearl’s ardent suitors come to visit her in Beverly Hills.

programme.desc: Granny’s plan to stop Pearl’s yodeling backfires when the police come and find her still.

programme.desc: Jed is made a bank vice president so he can compete in an interbank skeet shoot.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Family Tree
programme.desc: An expert on American history finds evidence that Jed’s family preceded the Mayflower to America.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Cuts The Family Tree
programme.desc: Mrs. Smith Standish is spending more time with the Clampetts, desperate to find out if the Clampetts did in fact precede the ‘Mayflower.’

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Granny's Spring Tonic
programme.desc: Granny hands around the Spring Tonic to the family, giving Jed a double dose. At the bank, Gloria transforms herself into a gorgeous secretary, with her sights set on Jed.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.
programme.sub-title: The Beginning of the End, Apollo Gets Complicated & The End of Apollo

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.
programme.sub-title: The Shuttle Program, The Challenger Disaster & Return to Space

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.
programme.sub-title: The Space Shuttle Matures, Complex Space Construction & The Final Years of the Space Shuttle

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living with Space
programme.desc: Astronauts and Cosmonauts train and study for years to work and live aboard the International Space Station. With this wealth of experience and insight behind them what do they think when they return to Earth?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Atmosphere
programme.desc: Our atmosphere is an unbelievably complex machine that protects us from the vacuum of space, shelters us from harmful radiation and allows us and the biosphere to breath; we need to learn much more about it so we can better it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The next 12 months will see an intense rise in flight tests, demonstration launches and high priority flights. Some are on time others are not. We check the flight status of some of this new hardware and these new capabilities.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Invasion Mars
programme.desc: For over 50 years we have bombarded Mars with our probes and landers. Spying from orbit to map terrain, finding her strengths and weaknesses. The time nearing for the full scale invasion of the planet- when humans walk on Mars and claim it for their own.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Amazing Cassini spacecraft and its sibling lander, Huygens, have now concluded their scientific studies, bringing back years of data. Now, Juno piercing the cloak of Jupiter and her distant relative New Horizons at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: We have been observing Earth for 40 years now, in the last 20 we have focus with intensity on the planet with new technologies and capabilities, we have accumulated a mass of data that is now revealing a complex and ever changing living planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The interface between Earth and space is the Ionosphere, a region of rarified gas and charged particles. It is very important for radio communications, radar, satellite signals and global positioning. Yet we know so little about it.

programme.title: Beyond Earth
programme.desc: Shot over eight years and with unprecedented access, Beyond Earth: The Beginning of NewSpace, is a journey into space exploration with leading astropreneurs that shows us what is in store for mankind.

programme.title: Bonnie & Clyde: Justified

programme.title: Secret Dealers
programme.desc: An unusual hand-drawn book starts a bidding war between the dealers in Worcestershire. In Shropshire, a woman faces a tough decision over whether to sell her prized collection of stuffed birds.

programme.title: Secret Dealers
programme.desc: The dealers attempt to outdo each other's bids so they can walk away with a silver trolley cart that a retired chef in Herefordshire has been clinging on to for years.

programme.title: Secret Dealers
programme.desc: Tim Hogarth offers to donate money to the British Legion in exchange for a death plaque.

programme.title: Secret Dealers
programme.desc: Karen Dalmeny discovers the other dealers are trying to hide a Victorian silver and pearl rattle from each other. Also, the dealers have trouble opening a 1920s Edison phonograph.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Beauty and the Geek Australia: Episode 6

programme.desc: The girls go to work for a cattle auctioneer, but when they’re sent to buy cattle feed, they charge several other items without permission; the auctioneer comes after them for the money, and the girl try to lie their way out of the debt.

programme.desc: It is difficult to find Suriname on a map. But it is not imaginary. Suriname is found at the heart of the Amazon: a country of jungle.

programme.title: Nerves Of Steel: Commercial Diver
programme.desc: Scuba diving is not always synonymous with leisure. Sometimes, some underwater work requires the expertise of a team of divers who will have to perform their tasks under difficult and complex conditions.

programme.title: Risk Takers: Police
programme.desc: When you go to work with a gun, you know your job is dangerous. And being a police officer is not getting safer.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A jackknifed HGV has blocked a lane of traffic.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Hot Girl Summer
programme.desc: Shortly after tying the knot Diana gave Robert an ultimatum: they'd either have an open relationship or she was gone. He wants to save the marriage, but she isn't ready to compromise. Can Diana finally settle with one man, or is this really the end?

programme.title: Divorce Court: Coming to America
programme.desc: Keith claims he is married to two other women overseas and plans to bring them over! Paw'lla says Keith is a fake pastor who doesn't know what he's talking about! Keith says he has a master plan for all of these wives!

programme.title: Divorce Court: Game Boy
programme.desc: Christy is done with Demetrice's video game obsession! He said he's better off with his games than being accused of looking at every woman that passes by. Will Demetrice snap back into reality or is this game over?

programme.title: Divorce Court: Firecracker
programme.desc: Gary claims Ebony's verbally abusive, acts like a dictator and is frustrated with her disrespectful comments. She loves Gary very much and claims to be a 'ride or die' girlfriend, but is over Gary's unmotivated, stuck in the mud ways.

programme.title: Trisha: Your Dad May Not Be Your Father!
programme.desc: Kiesha grew up believing that Lennie was her father. But another man, William, is claiming he slept with Kiesha’s mother Cynthia and that he could be her father. Then, Buddy wants a DNA test to prove whether he is the father of Aisha’s daughter.
programme.sub-title: Your Dad May Not Be Your Father!

programme.title: Divorce Court: Not Man Enough
programme.desc: No matter how hard Demont tries, he's always looking up at the bar Reasha keeps raising. Demont got a promotion and relocated for work, which raised her suspicions of him cheating. Can this couple ignite the spark or is this relationship totaled?

programme.title: Divorce Court: What Women Want
programme.desc: La'Tanya is honest to Jonathan with her sexual attraction tp other women. The final straw was when her kids came home singing "Jonathan is a bad daddy" after returning from a relative's house. Will Lynn send them separate ways?

programme.title: Divorce Court: Like a Virgin
programme.desc: Emily is 29 and a virgin. The pressure from her boyfriend Romeo to have sex is overwhelming. Their 20 year age difference may be part of the problem because she chats it up more with strangers than him. Can Judge Toler help them find common ground?

programme.title: Divorce Court: Cheating Husband
programme.desc: Corey has cheated on his wife with 27 women and wants a divorce because he can't trust her. She cheated once and can't get over how she hid it from him. He also argues that his 27 times were purely physical, but hers was an emotional affair.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Heart Break Hotel
programme.desc: Brianna says Steven constantly looks at other women behind her back which has taken a toll on her confidence. He says her overprotectiveness leads to arguments that end up with her accusing him of cheating.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Nana Bread
programme.desc: Markia says Herb's overactive sex drive is ruining their relationship because he wants it daily. When Herb doesn't get his way, he throws major tantrums. Can Herb learn to take breathers or has this 11 year relationship taking its toll?

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court: Splitting Hairs
programme.desc: It's hair divas in a hairy dispute. Things get hot under the collar. Is James splitting hairs with Carle over his bad hair day or is there just a hair more about this case?

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court: Screwing the Pooch
programme.desc: It's a real shaggy dog story. Shaneequa loved her precious pet pooch Fendy but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could. But where oh where has the little dog gone? Now find out who winds up in the dog house.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court: Gambling the Friendship
programme.desc: Daryl is suing his former friend for missing belongings that he believes were sold to fuel Rashain's gambling addiction. Rashain claims that they live in a bad neighborhood and the items were stolen.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court: Please Stand By
programme.desc: Months ago Rosa's big-screen TV had a big-time problem, so she called Michael, a TV repairman, to come to fix it. She says that he took the TV and never brought it back and now she wants her money.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court: Love Bites
programme.desc: Kent loaned Elizabath five grand to help pay for her dental work but it took a bitter bite out of their red hot relationship when he asked for his money back.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court: One Door Closes
programme.desc: Is this contractor crooked as a bent nail or is this homeowner's behavior in need of renovations... Find out how Judge Karen hammers for the truth.

programme.title: Put Your Hands Up: Tomorrowland Winter
programme.desc: Relive the first edition of Tomorrowland Winter with our team braving the snow and storm with some good music!

programme.title: Clubbing Experience - Series 7: Guillaume & The Coutu Dumont (live) @ MDRNTY - Caprices Festival
programme.desc: We recorded the live performance of Guillaume and the Coutu Dumont live act on the Cocoon stage at MDRNTY - Caprices Festival in Switzerland!
programme.sub-title: Guillaume & The Coutu Dumont (live) @ MDRNTY - Caprices Festival

programme.title: Clubbing Experience - Series 3: Carl Cox @ Family Piknik 2019
programme.desc: Oh yes, oh yes, relive the set of Carl Cox, the King of Techno! Two hours of pure pleasure from Family Piknik festival in Montpellier!

programme.title: Clubbing Experience: Miss Kittin @ Family Piknik 2018
programme.desc: Don't call her Miss. She is the most famous French DJ in the industry. Playing all over the world, producing some of the finest French techno tracks, singing during her performance, meet Miss Kittin and relive her set at Family Piknik in France.

programme.title: Clubbing Experience: SLVR @ Nameless Music Festival
programme.desc: 22-year-old Alessandro Silveri, better known as SLVR, is a DJ and producer based in Milan! He played on the mainstage at Nameless Music festival not far from his home town Lecco!

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Fight Party Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne's book group and Nick's boxing-match party collide in the family room on the same night, resulting in knock-out clashing.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Kevin Gets a Commercial Episode
programme.desc: Kevin's burgeoning career as a child actor has a negative fallout when a potential big break goes to his head. Ted Lange guest stars.
programme.sub-title: The Kevin Gets a Commercial Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Mother's Day Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne and Marilyn convene for a spa weekend for Mother's Day, but friction soon mounts between the two.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lindsey Goes Vegan Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey decides to take on a vegan diet and lifestyle, but she may have ulterior motives in doing so.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Staycation Episode
programme.desc: Nick tries to give his family the best vacation ever but things do not go well at all.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Thief Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey steals sixty dollars from Gigi's wallet and turns back around and blames Kevin for it.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Bad Dream Episode
programme.desc: Kevin and Nick goes to an R-rated movie, but Kevin has nightmares from seeing it.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The 22 Episode
programme.desc: The family oversleeps on the day Lindsey is scheduled to sing the national anthem at a baseball game. Meanwhile, Kevin gets sick.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Fatima comes to Andi's rescue. Sabrina realises she made a terrible mistake. Zac confronts Karen about why he could never betray her. (S2, ep20)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Karen struggles with her feelings for Zac. Gary reluctantly agrees to get counseling. Fatima senses hidden fears from Zac. (S2, ep21)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Gary and Andi consider taking a big and scary step. Fatima kicks her new love interest out of her house. Sabrina enjoys the company of a new man. (S2, ep22)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: When You're Confused
programme.desc: A world of confusion is left on the doorstep of this sisterhood, as they attempt to find solace in their own individual relationships. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: If I Should Die...
programme.desc: Proven paranormal investigator Ken Arrington leads a new class of characters as they try to help a family cope with what appears to be a demonic spirit in their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.
programme.sub-title: Return of the Dead: Glove II

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.
programme.sub-title: They Only Come Out at Night

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Another Song For Christmas
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Plane Death
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark investigate a gang of drug smugglers after an old friend of Mark's has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: One Winged Angels
programme.desc: Jonathan attempts to fan the flames of love between a woman and her ex-husband's best friend. But his efforts backfire when he falls for the woman himself.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Going Home, Going Home
programme.desc: Mark is in a state between life and death when he's critically injured in a car accident. Jonathan takes Mark back to childhood to give him a second chance to tell his grandfather how much he loves him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: As Difficult as ABC
programme.desc: Jonathan steps in when a heart condition sidelines a promising basketball player's dreams.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Child of God
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are on hand when a dying woman attempts a reconciliation with her estranged father. She is a single mother who wants her family to take the child.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Match Made in Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty is a lovelorn quadriplegic with a successful law practice. Jonathan is happy to play cupid, but Mark isn't so thrilled about it, because the woman in question is his cousin.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Banker and The Bum
programme.desc: A greedy banker and a good-hearted bum switch places. The bum dies, but the banker is now infused with love and generosity.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Getting Back on the Catwalk
programme.desc: Stacey is a former model whose appearance has gone downhill because of the demands of caring for both her new baby and her ill mother. She's eager to get back on the catwalk and our team of experts will do a head to toe transformation.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger New Zealand: Josh Thomson
programme.desc: Josh Thomson is a struggling actor, struggling with terminal scruffiness, and premature aging. Fiona McDonald and her team of anti-aging experts prepare to take on Josh, making him 10 Years Younger in just 10 days.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Rockin' Rollback
programme.desc: George is a family man who works long hours running a rock 'n' roll rehearsal studio. His busy life took a toll on his appearance. To keep up with his hip, young clientele and fashionable wife, he'll need help from the 10 YEARS YOUNGER team.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Faith in a New Look
programme.desc: Peggy is a single chaplain who uses her faith and people skills helping sick children in a children's hospital. She wants to regain her confidence with a younger, sassier look – that's where we come in. It's time to make Peggy look 10 Years Younger!

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: No Pain No Gain
programme.desc: Once a sun-worshipping fashion model, Linda led a charmed life of good looks. After the devastating loss of her family, life became difficult. Linda is willing to do anything to recover her former looks and finds out that beauty comes with a price.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Good-Looking Lifesaver
programme.desc: Iris dreams of being an EMT and making a great life for her family. But she's afraid her aging looks and lack of style stand in the way of her success. We're going to give Iris a professional appearance and help her look 10 YEARS YOUNGER.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Gill Collyer
programme.desc: A hectic household of 3 lively kids, 1 husband, 4 cats and a dog, equals chaos and stress for Gill Collyer from Devon and it's showing all over her face. Luckily Nicky Hambleton-Jones and her team are here to the rescue.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Cruising For A New Look
programme.desc: Lizette's a single mom who wants to look great for an upcoming cruise. Our doctors will repair her smile and skin, and correct her vision. Then the Glam Squad will give her a not new style. All aboard! We're making Lizette look 10 YEARS YOUNGER.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Carole Ward
programme.desc: Nicky Hambleton-Jones and the team come to the rescue of 47-year-old Carole Ward who feels very unglamorous.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Kerry Fender
programme.desc: From a distance Kerry Fender seems frumpy, defeated and definitely middle-aged. Presenter Nicky Hambleton-Jones assembles a crack team of dentist, hairdresser and cosmetic GP but to get Kerry looking 10 years younger.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Healthy, Happy And Handsome
programme.desc: Robert survived Leukemia, but it devastated his appearance. Since beating his disease, he met the love of his life and got engaged. All he wants is to take his long-delayed engagement photo, but first he needs to look 10 YEARS YOUNGER.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Hot Momma
programme.desc: Michele is a young wife and mother of twins who feels completely overwhelmed by her newfound responsibilities. She is desperate to return her appearance to match her real age.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny and Alice have been preparing a cheetah for release in the wild but for some reason Danny's mind isn't on the job. He's been pre-occupied because he plans to buy a ring and propose to Alice!

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are taking a well deserved holiday but Olivia's upset to learn they're leaving that day. Angry at missing out on a driving lesson, she decides to take the jeep out on her own.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: Alice is enjoying her new job at Mara even though her animal census has revealed they have a lone male hyena that needs a pack. Du Plessis isn't happy about Alice working for next door.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Danny's continued estrangement from Alice is really starting to take its toll. Over at Mara, Alice puts on a brave face as she meets Tom Cox, the owner of a rare male black leopard.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Caroline returns to find that all is not well at Leopard's Den. Danny has been putting a brave face on his ban but his attempts at helping out around the house are getting on everyone's nerves and Alice is finding his back-seat vetting especially hard.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: Danny is delighted to have his veterinary license back again and being back at work is helping to distract him from the impending anniversary of Sarah's death.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Du Plessis is restless after his heart surgery but the family insist he needs to relax. Meanwhile Danny and Alice are happy to have closed down a zoo down that has been mistreating animals.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: While on honeymoon in London, Alice discovers that Danny has some final business to do before they can return home to Africa. He's reluctantly arranged to meet his estranged father, Robert, who has recently got back in touch.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 27
programme.desc: The Scott's spend the day at a restaurant and a music shop, which is not as successful as Bridget hopes, but Erin shows some improvement as she drinks from her own beaker and tries a different porridge.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 28
programme.desc: It's the fourth day in the House of Tiny Tearaways, and it is two days before the families are due to go home. The Fallon's spend the day at a Dog Agility Centre. Erin Scott manages to play with and lick various different foods.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 29
programme.desc: On the penultimate day for this week's families at the House of Tiny Tearaways, Erin Scott begins the day refusing to eat but by the end of the day manages to lick a spoon of egg, beans and potato shapes.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 30
programme.desc: It's time for the Fallon's, Scott's and Macleod's to say goodbye to Dr. Tanya Byron. Tanya shows each of the families how far they have come during their stay by showing them clips from during their stay.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay saves Luke's bacon with a polished portrait. Sketch beautifies Mark's belly Buddha.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Alice tackles Beverley's backside blunder. Jay wipes Bailey's holiday Poomoji tatt clean.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Sketch removes Karl's tribute to his ex, while Alice tackles Alex's Game of Thrones inking.

programme.title: 4x4: Trendy City - SUVs
programme.desc: City-SUVs are the latest trend in the automotive world. They aren't necessarily made for offroad terrain but attract customers through their modern and urban design. In this episode, the Subaru XV shows its offroad skills, and the Nissan Juke is take…

programme.title: 4x4: Land Rover Special
programme.desc: The Land Rover Defender is one of the oldest offroad car models. It may be loud and uncomfortable, but it's absolutely authentic in its simplicity. We took a look at this iconic vehicle and 70 years of Land Rover history.

programme.title: 4x4: Extraordinary SUVs
programme.desc: This Mitsubishi Outlander Plug-In Hybrid is the world's first hybrid SUV with two electric motors and a 2-liter combustion engine. We tested if such a combination makes sense for offroad vehicles. Also: the Chevrolet Silverado...

programme.title: 4x4: SUV Girlpower
programme.desc: Nancy and Nadia, two daring Jordanian women faced the challenge to cross the Moroccan desert in a Hummer H3. The two professional racers took part in the Conti 4x4 Trophy - a demanding rally through the Atlas Mountains and the Western Sahara.

programme.title: 4x4: SUV Concepts
programme.desc: Before Bentley and Jaguar started producing their own luxury SUV models, the two British brands presented their take on this special range of cars. We took a look at their concept cars, the Bentley EXP 9F and Jaguar's C-X17.

programme.title: 4x4: Normal vs. Lifestyle SUVs
programme.desc: The SUVs Nissan X-Trail and BMW X4 certainly aren't typical offroaders. We witnessed Nissan's presentation of their new X-Trail model and the BMW X4 world premiere in Bilbao. Also: the Steinbeißer Trophy...

programme.title: 4x4: American SUVs
programme.desc: In the United States, SUVs aren't usually considered simple workhorses but rather treated as regular everyday vehicles. US-Americans don't want to miss out on space, comfort and loading capacity. Their motto is: the bigger, the better.

programme.title: 4x4: Tuned SUVs
programme.desc: SUVs usually are rather impressive right out of the factory, but there are many tuning and customizing options: huge wheels, crazy colors and perfomance similar to super sports cars. One might ask if such alterations are really necessary, but enthusi…

programme.title: 4x4: Small, strong, stylish
programme.desc: At first glance, compact cars like the Audi A1, the Volkswagen Golf and the Mini don't seem to belong in this series, but when the "A1" becomes the "S1" and the Golf gets a "R" in its name, these small cars turn into all-wheel beasts.

programme.title: 4x4: Fascination offroad
programme.desc: At the All-Wheel Adventure in Bad Kissingen, Germany, the biggest exhibition for offroaders in Europe, we test drove the Rallye Defender and examined how a regular Jeep Wrangler with only a few modifications could double in price.

programme.title: 4x4: All- Wheel- Drive on snow
programme.desc: In winter, when the streets get slippery, an all-wheel drive vehicle brings many advantages as you gain more traction. Under icy conditions we experienced one day in snowy Austria with rally professional Niki Schelle in a Suzuki SX4 S-Cross.

programme.title: 4x4: Rallye Fun
programme.desc: Countryside tours aren't the only option with an all-wheel drive car. You can also have a lot of fun on gravel roads. We show how that goes in a Subaru WRX STI. Also: in the 1990s, Ford had a successful go at international rally competitions...

programme.title: 4x4: All- Wheel- Drive on station wagons
programme.desc: Station wagons are usually regarded as family cars or just vehicles with a lot of cargo hold. But the Skoda Octavia, the Opel Insignia Country Tourer, the Subaru Outback, the Audi S4 allroad quattro and the Seat Leon x-perience want to be more than...
programme.sub-title: All- Wheel- Drive on station wagons

programme.title: 4x4: Extreme offroad cars
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a look at some of the more extreme specimens in the offroad world: a Fiat Panda monster truck whose tires have a diameter of 1.5 meters, a Ford Raptor with 600 hp, a conversion of a Mercedes G-class Edition by ORC...

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 5
programme.desc: With Grot a huge success, Reggie has a difficult choice to make at Groomtech. Meanwhile, his attempts to make things up with Nicola lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 1
programme.desc: Reggie Perrin is feeling frustrated and alienated after ten years working at Groomtech. With his wife Nicola too busy for him, he becomes besotted with his new colleague Jasmine.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 2
programme.desc: With Reggie's mother and Nicola's dad interfering in his marriage, and his inability to get on with people at work, Reggie Perrin finds himself taking a step too far with Jasmine.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reggie enjoys teaching at Nicola's school, in his search to find a new focus in his life. He invites the class to spend a day at Groomtech with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 4
programme.desc: When Reggie goes to Helsinki on a business trip with Jasmine, his marriage to Nicola faces its sternest test. Meanwhile Chris has concerns that Reggie is faltering.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 5
programme.desc: Chris seeks Reggie's help as he struggles to convince the Groomtech board he is the right man for the job.

programme.title: The Ambassador: Innocent Passage
programme.desc: The new British Ambassador to Ireland, Harriet Smith, arrives in Dublin to discover that the Irish government is accusing the British of sinking one of their ships in the Irish Sea.

programme.title: The Ambassador: Refuge
programme.desc: Ambassador Smith gives the battered British wife of a Saudi diplomat refuge in the embassy. The decision may have major repercussion for the Irish government.

programme.title: The Ambassador: Nine Tenths of the Law
programme.desc: When a young British girl is arrested for drug smuggling, Ambassador Smith discovers that the girl works at the same bar as her 19-year-old son, Nate.

programme.title: The Ambassador: A Cluster of Betrayals
programme.desc: Ambassador Smith's assistant is held hostage by a distraught man in protest of the number of children he says are dying from nuclear waste pollution of the Irish Sea by British facilities.
