programme.sub-title: Boat Lean and Grab, Scorpion Helmet Spin, Truck Switch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dual Dunk, Isolation Barrel, Car Mine Field
programme.desc: Celebrity edition! Contestants will hang by their ankles from a crane above the water. Contestants must also drive on a swervy course while trying to run through a series of barrels and wooden structures.
programme.sub-title: Dual Dunk, Isolation Barrel, Car Mine Field

programme.title: Fear Factor: Descender Jump/Eat Sheep's Eye/Water Tank
programme.desc: Contestant will hang from a bar placed outside a 12th story window and drop by a descender line. Each contestant will be asked to eat three sheep's eyes in three minutes. Each contestant is lowered by their feet head first into a water tank.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dog Attack/Snake Pit/Beam Walk
programme.desc: Contestants will fire a starter's pistol and run from an attack dog. The contestants will lie in a pit made up of faux rocks and burlap... Oh, and snakes.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Semi Truck Jump/Meal Worm Pit/Reverse Bungee With Paint Ball
programme.desc: A contestant stands on top of a moving semi truck jump and leaps. Approximately 300,000 superworms will be placed into a case with the contestants. Each contestant will hold a paint ball gun and be harnessed to a reverse bungee line.
programme.sub-title: Semi Truck Jump/Meal Worm Pit/Reverse Bungee With Paint Ball

programme.title: Fear Factor: Eat Buffalo Testicles/Pendulum Swing-Human Wrecking Ball/Submerged Car
programme.desc: Each contestant will be asked to eat two boiled buffalo testicles in 4 minutes. Each contestant will be harnessed and raised by crane. Each contestant will sit in the front seat of a car as the car is lowered by crane into water.
programme.sub-title: Eat Buffalo Testicles/Pendulum Swing-Human Wrecking Ball/Submerged Car

programme.title: Fear Factor: Net Jump/Worm Cocktail/Tunnel Crawl
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a one hundred and ten foot tower. Each contestant will be asked to eat 6 worms in 4 minutes. Each contestant will have to find their way through an underground tunnel.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake. The ice strip landing goes fine, but when the plane takes off from the strip, the right landing gear gets stuck in the wheel well.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: For Sale By Owner
programme.desc: When South Korean buyers come to Buffalo to look at a water bomber, the pressure is on mechanic Cory to get the plane ready. But a landing gear emergency puts him and chief pilot Justin in serious danger.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Over Seas
programme.desc: Buffalo has to get a CL-215 water bomber to buyers in Korea. So Justin and Cory fly the plane to Vancouver Harbour, where it will be hoisted onto a cargo ship sailing across the Pacific Ocean to its destinatin, a method of delivery no one has ever tried.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Water Wings
programme.desc: In South Korea, Cory and Justin meet the ship delivering Buffalo's water bomber plane to buyers there but are frustrated by the buyers' poor planning. Tempers flare when they try to get the plane off the ship and delivered to its final destination

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Meltdown
programme.desc: As spring arrives and Ray's retirement day approaches, Sean surprises everyone by leaving Buffalo for a job with the competition. So Buffalo brings in Electra pilot Brian Harrison to finish the contract.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: North Atlantic Convoy
programme.desc: Greenland's Narsarsuaq airport - known as one the world's most dangerous approaches - looms on the horizon as Cory and Justin begin a trans-global journey to deliver two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey. Christine pushes to become a DC-3 co-pilot,

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Sunk
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago. It's a personal quest for Joe; he flew that plane at the beginning of his career.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Turkey or Bust
programme.desc: Justin and Cory are stranded in Croatia while trying to complete the delivery of two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey. Metal rock band Iron Maiden's lead singer Bruce Dickinson flies Buffalo's DC-3 from Edmonton to Yellowknife.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Seismic Earthquake Shocker!
programme.desc: Just when Raimon were feeling confident, they get a wake up call in the form of a big slap in the face from Xavier and his Genesis team. Sure, part of being a winning team is being able to cope with loss, but a loss this big?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Captain’s Test!
programme.desc: Disaster after disaster is hitting the Raimon team hard. First Nathan decides to quit, then another member decides he can't take it anymore. Mark is in crisis and can't deal with everything that’s happening.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Great Battle in the Southern Sea
programme.desc: On the way to Okinawa, the team are waylaid when Willy’s scientific curiosity gets the better of him. The meeting proves fruitful though, as they encounter a surfer with a kick like a jet engine!
programme.sub-title: The Great Battle in the Southern Sea

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Flame Striker
programme.desc: Raimon have arrived in Okinawa to begin their search for the Flame Striker. Most of the team are convinced it’s Axel, but they won't know until they see him. Hold on, who’s this guy?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Radical Rhythmic Soccer Game
programme.desc: Mark and the boys successfully put the nightmare of Xavier behind them, and now it’s time to have some fun. But fun always means soccer and they’re off to a game with Mary Times High, who Hurley’s decided to play for.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Fist of Justice!
programme.desc: Raimon are in trouble against Mary Times and their amazing rhythmic style of play. They better find a way to mix up the timing before they’re drummed out of the game entirely!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Epsilon’s Counterattack!
programme.desc: Just when they thought it was safe to go back on the soccer field, Raimon are besieged by the aliens once more. It’s Epsilon again, but not as they know it. Their power has increased and they’re nastier than ever.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Fire Revival!
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Epsilon Prime are wiping the floor with Raimon Jr, but their spirits can't be broken. If they all pull together and work hard and have fun, they can beat these aliens and save their earth. Or can they?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Freezing Darkness of Diamond Dust!
programme.desc: The team are ecstatic - they’ve got Axel back and they’re heading home for some R and R. All is not well with Shawn Frost, but with some care and attention he should be back to full strength soon.
programme.sub-title: The Freezing Darkness of Diamond Dust!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Byron - The Back Up of the Gods
programme.desc: Well the team didn’t get their beef stew, it’s straight back to work and a big game against Diamond Dust - the master ranked team of Alius Academy.
programme.sub-title: Byron - The Back Up of the Gods

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: A New Challenge!
programme.desc: Mark’s been forced to quit his position as goalie, but the situation isn’t as bad as everyone feared - he’s just moving a little up the field and becoming a defender!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Mark Vs Axel!
programme.desc: Mark and the rest of the team make a visit to Royal Academy. For some it’s brings back bad memories, but for others it’s an opportunity to learn new moves and new tactics.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Miraculous Team!
programme.desc: Raimon have been practicing and hoping for more time to prepare for the inevitable alien assault, but before they know it they’re here, and stronger than ever.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Blizzard of Fire!
programme.desc: Diamond Dust and Prominence are pounding on Raimon with the full weight of their combined force, but Raimon have found a hole in their defenses and are managing to fight back.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Alius Academy Finally Arrives!
programme.desc: The secrets behind Alius Academy are beginning to bubble up to the surface and it looks like Coach Lina knows much more than she’s saying.

programme.title: Unlikely Hero
programme.desc: A washed-up writer forms an unlikely friendship with a teenager from Long Island. Starring: Jeff Daniels, Emma Stone, Ryan Reynolds, Lisa Kudrow, Kieran Culkin

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: A middle-aged couple's career and marriage are overturned when a disarming young couple enters their lives.

programme.title: Celebrity
programme.desc: The fortunes of a husband and wife differ drastically after they divorce. Starring: Kenneth Branagh, Judy Davis, Leonardo DiCaprio, Greg Mottola, Melanie Griffith, Douglas McGrath, Charlize Theron

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Ralph tries to save himself and a town from a rampaging motorcycle gang.

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero: Classical Gas
programme.desc: Ralph and Pam help his students rehearse their rock band for a show, not realizing the promoter plans to release nerve gas into the audience.

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy real estate broker falls in love with a younger man, who introduces her to BDSM. Using her newly awakened sexual prowess, she finally takes charge of her own life.

programme.title: The Land that Time Forgot
programme.desc: A modern adaptation of the classic novel about the survivors of a shipwreck who are trapped on an island teeming with dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Legend of Bloody Jack
programme.desc: Campfire urban legend Bloody Jack comes to life when one of his kin resurrects him from the dead.

programme.title: Sunday School Musical
programme.desc: Two competing groups of high school students must rally together and enter a song and dance competition in order to save their church from closing.

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill
programme.desc: Sean heads into Stockport, Greater Manchester and travels to Welkin Mill. He investigates claims of paranormal activity which also appear to be linked to his previous investigation of Moviescape.
programme.sub-title: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the mill and is attacked by a spirit. Jane joins the investigation with surprising results. Will it have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean enters one of the UK's most haunted escape rooms and it appears that he is not the only one trying to escape. Will the spirits play games with him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation continues at the escape room and a certain spirit attempts to tug at Sean's clothing. Will he finally survive the escape room?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lock Keepers Haunting at Lock 91
programme.desc: Sean heads to Manchester to investigate a lock keeper's cottage that was built in 1804. It appears that the spirits are still watching over the building and terrifying its customers.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Leeds and investigates Abbey House Museum among a maze of Victorian streets and shops. Who will he bump into tonight and what secrets does this location hold?
programme.sub-title: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Misfortune Hunters
programme.desc: Betty begins to mysteriously receive fortune cookies that instruct her to carry out simple good deeds each of which leads to a reward.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Ship of Ghouls
programme.desc: When a sunken treasure is found off the coast of Riverdale, Reggie succumbs to the greedy curse of the pirate's gold.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Something is Haunting Riverdale High
programme.desc: Spooky and mysterious things are happening at Riverdale High.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Supreme Girl vs. Dr. Arachnid
programme.desc: Dr. Arachnid, an evil supervillain, has come to Riverdale to commit some dastardly deeds.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Marooned on Mongo
programme.desc: Earth teenagers Flash Gordon and Dale Arden, and their reluctant friend Dr. Zarkov, journey to the fantastic planet Mongo where they fight to defeat the evil planetary dictator, Ming the Merciless.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Jaws of the Jungle
programme.desc: Flash, Dale and Dr. Zarkov rescue the Lionid Princess Thundar from Ming and the treacherous Vine People. This feat earns them the respect of Prince Talon and renews the rebellion against Ming.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Caves of Doom
programme.desc: Flash races time to save Dale and Dr. Zarkov from being sacrificed to a volcano by the Trogs, a tribe of suspicious cave dwellers.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Vandals from the Void
programme.desc: When Mongo is attacked by a fleet of UFOs, only Flash questions Ming's attempts to form an alliance with the Rebel forces.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Fangs of Fury
programme.desc: Thundar's mother falls fatally ill, and only Ming holds the antidote. His price for the cure: Flash Gordon! How will Thundar decide?

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Terror Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: Queen Kayla and her Shark People hold Flash captive underwater while Ming prepares a sneak attack on the Rebel forces.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Wings of Destruction
programme.desc: Flash competes against Aura in the Mongonian Aerial Games. Although a truce is in effect during the games, Ming attacks.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Invisible Claw
programme.desc: Sulpha, Ming's dragon scientist, creates an army of invisible Rock People to conquer a peaceful desert kingdom. Can Flash stop them?

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Pit of the Tigrons
programme.desc: While Ming is away, Aura takes command of Mongo. She offers a truce if Flash will agree to marry her and rule Mongo at her side.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Cry of the Pantheron
programme.desc: Kobalt the mercenary pretends to fall in love with Thundar, raising Flash's suspicions when he joins an attack on Ming's bomb factory.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Dragon Strikes
programme.desc: Flash, Dale and Dr. Zarkov discover Mango's legendary lost Hall of Science. Surprisingly, Sulpha helps keep the secret from Ming.

programme.title: Bizarre E.R. Series: Episode 10
programme.desc: A sow charges a pig handler. A trumpeter takes off the top of her finger with a bike chain. A pensioner mistakes olbas oil for eye drops. A man has his scalp shaved off after a car crash.

programme.title: Bizarre E.R. Series: Episode 1
programme.desc: A man barbecues his own buttocks. A builder is impaled through the thigh on a pole. A footballer's kneecap faces the wrong way. Medical professionals confess their most bizarre and outrageous cases.

programme.title: Bizarre E.R. Series: Episode 2
programme.desc: A driver is run over by the mechanic sent to repair his car. A schoolgirl is injured playing "Wii Sports: Tennis". A man's testicles are squashed in a motorbike crash.

programme.title: Hit By A Train
programme.desc: A mountain biker has multiple injuries and her boyfriend has multiple fainting spells; a man's legs are severed when he's run over by a train; a drunken bachelor helps reveal the secret of a mystery nurse that has been working in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: An alligator snapping turtle is clamped to a man's neck and won't let go; an ER physician races against an impending hurricane to clear the ER of patients before it hits; and a tree trimmer is 20 feet above ground when he is impaled by his chainsaw.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Skewered Skydivers
programme.desc: Two skydivers, impaled by the same fence post, are rushed to the ER; multiple patrons from a dance club suddenly stop breathing and Dr. Jasper must determine the cause; and a bride-to-be may miss her wedding after her finger gets stuck in a make-up jar.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A patient arrives with paralysis in her legs; a boy is crushed by an ATV and the hospital doesn't have the right equipment to treat him; a doctor accidentally injects herself with epinephrine

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Junk food addict Andy moves into the feeding clinic with `too-busy-to-eat' Hannah, who battles with Andy's junk food medley as she forces down pizzas, burgers and kebabs.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s non stop tears and tantrums as 21 stone 5lbs LouiseHayes is forced to swap her normal 5-6 course feasts for superskinny Josh Evans‘s diet which barely features a proper meal.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a three-bed semi in South London, a flat in Gravesend and a house in Plymouth.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander view a cottage in Kent and three-bedroom terrace in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view houses in Cardiff, Redding and Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 25
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit an end of terrace in Sittingbourne, a house in Watford and in Alverston Derby Martin visits a two up two down.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 6
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see a farmhouse cottage with original features in Matlock, Derbyshire; an end-of-terrace in Eastleigh, Hampshire; and a two bedroom.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 6
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a damp property in Devon, a London flat with an exhibit for the antiques road show and a house in Leicester with surprising views out the back.

programme.title: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair
programme.desc: Twin British sex-bombs Mary Millington and Rosemary England take on an astrologer who can bed women as easily as he can read fortunes! No-one goes home a Virgo - and Diana Dors adds to the glam!

programme.title: Great American Sex Scandal
programme.desc: A shy accountant is charged with embezzlement, but an overtly sexual testimony by a secretary paints him in a different light. Jurors are trapped when a trial suddenly turns into a tabloid field day. Starring: Mädchen Amick, Stephen Baldwin.

programme.title: Confessions of A Sex Maniac
programme.desc: A sex-crazed young architect decides that he wants to design a building shaped like the perfect breast, so he searches all over London for a woman who bears the perfect model.

programme.title: Spaced Out
programme.desc: When three voluptuous female aliens crash-land in an English park, the result is close encounters of the sauciest kind! Three hapless men witness the UFO's arrival and are kidnapped by the sexy extra-terrestrials who discover the joys of first contact!

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: New neighbors move in across the street all the way from Southern Italy and Rob decides to do an all-Mediterranean bbq dinner in their honour. Hot of the grill are octopus, sardines and Moroccan lamb kabobs along with some mouthwatering sides.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Karaoke Slow Ribs
programme.desc: It’s karaoke night at Robs place. That means lots of bad singing and lots of great food. It’s a ribapolooza! Rob bbqs some smoked spareribs, spicy beef short ribs and fresh grilled veg for his wanna be stars.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Engagement
programme.desc: Rob prepares a special romantic dinner for one of his pals who is planning on popping the big marriage question to his date. They wine and dine on a gourmet meal including zucchini crab cakes with smoked salsa, grilled lobster with basil mayonnaise.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Lunar Eclipse
programme.desc: There’s a total eclipse of the moon out tonight and everyone is coming over to Rob’s for the big show. In the darkness they feast on grilled chicken tikka, pork tenderloin with a banana salsa, and fabulous grilled fennel with anchovy - garlic butter.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: The Block Party
programme.desc: Every year the neighborhood gets together for a summer afternoon block party. This year it’s at Robs place. He makes a great impression with a menu that dazzles including oyster kabobs, spicy chicken wings, pork skewers, and more.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Hawaiian Luau
programme.desc: Looking sexy in his grass skirt, Rob and his fish monger friend Jim Foster hang up their surf boards and throw a great Hawaiian Luau. They prepare a feast including kaluah pork, cowabunga shrimp and some freshly grilled fennel and orange salad.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Mardi Gras Party
programme.desc: Rob throws a hot Mardi Gras party with a Cajun Creole Menu. There’s no parade, but there is great food, fabulous music and beads galore! Skillet Cornbread, Cajun catfish, and creole smoked ribs get this party going an keep it going all night long.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Bar-Beef-Cue Celebration
programme.desc: Men love beer. Men love fire. Men love to eat. Put it all together and you get a backyard full of men feasting off of a beer inspired barbecued meal including roasted chicken on a beer can, beer wings, beer burgers and even a beer dressing.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Airband Concert Pre-Party
programme.desc: Rob and his close friends are singing in an airband contest. To commemorate this occasion Rob prepares a feast of fabulous food including Proscuitto wrapped veal, grilled baby onions, asparagus rafts and parmesan crusted scallops.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Japanese Farewell Dinner
programme.desc: Rob’s friend has just accepted a job to teach English in Japan. As a sendoff Rob is preparing an Asian Feast on the grill – juicy slow rotisserie duck, seared fresh tuna and smoked asian veggies. It’s a bon voyage dinner she certainly won’t forget!

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Godfather Italian Feast
programme.desc: Rob’s favourite movie of all time is The Godfather. He and his friends gather for an Italian feast off the grill before heading inside to watch the movie. Rob prepares pasta sauce, spicy Italian sausage, grilled veal chops and delicious calamari.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Caribbean Bon Voyage Fiesta
programme.desc: In honour of Rob’s neighbors’ grand prize win of all expenses paid cruise to the Caribbean, Rob prepares a Caribbean Feast. Smoked Pork loin in a passion fruit applesauce, jerk snapper and island salsa are all on his menu.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Wine & Cheese Party
programme.desc: Rob is having a wine & cheese party with a bunch of his closest friends. From the lamb chops to the lobster tails - he combines the wine and cheese into every element of the delicious grilled menu.

programme.title: A is for Apple: Cashews and Carrots
programme.desc: Chef Lauren Gulyas tests her imagination with cashews and carrots. First, she makes cashew chicken and carrot cupcakes. But how will she combine them?

programme.title: A is for Apple: Cauliflower and Cranberries
programme.desc: In this “C” challenge, Chef Robert Jewell shows us what he can do with cauliflower and cranberries – on their own, and in one unconventional dish.

programme.title: Hunter: The Turning Point
programme.desc: When Hunter and McCall investigate the alleged death of a reporter, they uncover an extortion plot involving a wealthy industrialist who has illicit dealings with a construction firm.

programme.title: Hunter: Hot Prowl
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall become suspicious when a Bel Air housewife refuses to identify the man who robbed her of a million-dollar necklace.

programme.title: Hunter: Allegra
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the mysterious death of Allegra, Hunter's former girlfriend, to determine if the beautiful young heiress jumped or was pushed from a skyscraper window.

programme.title: Hunter: Renegade
programme.desc: When Hunter investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner, Frank Garriman, becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.

programme.title: Hunter: The Black Dahlia
programme.desc: Detective Doyle comes out of retirement to help Hunter and McCall investigate the real-life murder of actress-turned-prostitute Elizabeth Short, who was cut in half 41 years before.

programme.title: Hunter: Not Just Another John Doe
programme.desc: When Hunter and McCall investigate the murder of an unidentified man, their interest is piqued because the victim seemingly never existed -- and the killing appears to be a professional murder.

programme.title: Hunter: Naked Justice - Part 1
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the mysterious death of a famous movie actress and encounter a surviving sister hungry for the inheritance.

programme.title: Hunter: Naked Justice - Part 2
programme.desc: Hunter, investigating the murder of a famous movie actress, follows a contract killer to Mexico and learns why the CIA is interested in the killing.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The 2010 "Fifth Gear" awards recognize winners in categories of Best Small Car, Best Family Car, Best Fast Car and Car of the Year.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith tests the VW Passat CC vs. the Mercedes CLS; Jonny Smith becomes an ice cream man for the day to test out the newly revamped Citroen Berlingo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests the new Grande Punto Abarth; Tim Shaw investigates whether it's possible to save huge amounts of money by going back to basics and servicing your own car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato test two roadsters on the track; Tom Ford tests the sexy new Maserati GranTurismo coupe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny enters his very first track day event.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford visits billionaire Bernie Ecclestone's sprawling garage to explore his rare collection before he auctions off more than 50 of these unique models.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason face off on an enormous off-road playground; Tim investigates the cratered world of potholes.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Comedian Paddy McGuinness returns to take his motorbike test; Vicki takes two Audi TTs to the track for a shootout; Jason drives the Bowler Nemesis.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason teaches rugby legend and TV personality Matt Dawson how to drift like a hooligan in a 500 horsepower Audi supercar.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim reveals the best way for motorists to wash their cars; Jason pits three gold-medalist sailors against one another in a track race.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki visits the luxury car show Salon Privé and gives exclusive behind-the-scenes access as she judges the Best Supercar award.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim heads to London to investigate the new craze of car share clubs; Jason Plato meets up with celebrity chef James Martin, whose enviable car collection includes a busted Formula One.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford test drives the new Ford Fiesta; Vicki and Tiff are aided by renowned trainer Simon Pavey in a motorcycle race.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw takes Renault to task for overcharging customers; Tiff runs a shootout between two coupes; Vicki spends a day with Formula One star Lewis Hamilton.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Love
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion, one that sits in the core of our soul and fills our lives with hope. But when love turns sour, the results can be deadly. In an act of revenge, these deadly women unite with one common goal, to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Baby-Faced Killers
programme.desc: These baby-faced girls may look childish and innocent, but behind their little girl smiles lies a darkness most adults never experience. When their inner turmoil bubbles to the surface, they become unlikely criminals.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Senseless Slayings
programme.desc: When a person places no value on human life, they can become unstoppable in their twisted missions to destroy the lives around them. These women all pushed boundaries, and shattered lives with their actions.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The Best Of Laurel And Hardy
programme.desc: The best moments from the most comical duo in film history: Stan Laurel and Oliver Hardy! This compilation features some of the funniest scenes from comedies that made this pair into household names.
programme.sub-title: The Best Of Laurel And Hardy (1939)

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Berth Marks
programme.desc: Stanley and Oliver stumble into the wrong sleeping compartment on the train to Pottsville.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Sons Of The Desert
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie's wives find out they've been tricked into believing they're on a medical cruise.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Block Heads
programme.desc: Unaware that the Great War has ended, Stan remains faithfully at his post for twenty years

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Below Zero
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie have a streak of back luck after their instruments get smashed.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Any Old Port!
programme.desc: In need of money, Ollie signs Stan up for a prize fight against an old nemesis.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Another Fine Mess
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie hide in a mansion to escape from a policeman.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Busy Bodies
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie battle inanimate objects, coworkers, and the laws of physics in a sawmill.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Perfect Day
programme.desc: Perfect Day is a 1929 short comedy film starring Laurel and Hardy.

programme.title: Wedding SOS: Mission: Marriage

programme.title: Rich Groom Poor Groom: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Frugal groom Mike is full of whacky ideas and thinks planning a wedding should be a piece of cake. He wants to create the feeling of over the top drama with a “secret agent spy” meets “luxe casino” theme for the wedding.

programme.title: Wedding SOS: The Miracle Wedding?
programme.desc: Maurice and Keesau were brought together by their common faith… And now they’re putting their faith in God to iron out their problematic wedding. With only a week to go, Jane is going to need a miracle... Can she get this couple to see the light?

programme.title: Wedding SOS: The Wedding of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Jennifer and Shawn’s mid-winter, cottage-themed wedding is in just two weeks… But their focus is on Shawn’s critical condition. Will the groom be well enough to attend his own wedding?

programme.title: Rich Bride Poor Bride: I Speak For Him
programme.desc: Reena and Peter rely completely on their wedding planner to pull off their perfect day.

programme.title: Rich Bride Poor Bride: More Is More
programme.desc: Bride Patrycja and groom Tom met, they quickly began their journey down the matrimonial aisle. Although the couple has no problem foreseeing a beautiful life together, they do lack vision for their big day...

programme.title: Wedding SOS: Big Day, Child's Play
programme.desc: Gerry and Jaycee are bringing their two cultures together for one giant wedding… But with just ten days to go, the procrastinating soon-to-be-weds are in a tug of war about the details. Can Jane get them to focus on the bigger picture?

programme.title: Rich Bride Poor Bride: Hey Big Spender
programme.desc: Scott and Maria struggle to maintain balance between both of their influences.

programme.title: Wedding SOS: Eat, Drink & Be Married
programme.desc: ‘It couple’ Nadia and Derek are getting married in ten days. And while their 200 guests are expecting the show of the year, the couple’s relationship is at an all-time low. Can Jane save the day? And will her romance intervention pay off in time?

programme.title: Rich Bride Poor Bride: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Angela and Lenux have been saving for their wedding for years. When the big day comes, was it worth it?

programme.title: Wedding SOS: Wedding Loco
programme.desc: After meeting on the job, Tatiana and Bart fell in love and now they’re getting married... But with just eight days to go, a holy trinity of wedding problems is threatening to turn the stressed-out couple’s event into a disaster.

programme.title: Wedding SOS: Here Comes The Brides
programme.desc: Sabryna and Jenn met at teachers college, fell in love, and now they’re getting married. But with just a week to go until their big day, one high-strung bride is freaking out, the other laid-back bride is too busy to help.

programme.title: A Prison on Earth
programme.desc: In the shadows of other dimensions, there lies a nefarious force waging war upon humans for millennia from the space between spaces - a dark force that governs not just our thoughts and actions but our very souls.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is a powerfully rich cabal with a globalist agenda conspiring to destroy sovereign nations and impose authoritarian rule?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard travels to England to investigate Britain's Roswell, also known as the Woodbridge-Bentwaters UFO incident, considered by many to be one of the best documented UFO cases on record

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several independent researchers about the efforts of international bankers to control the course of history and enslave humanity through their monopoly of the creation of money and the manipulation of the money supply.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.
programme.sub-title: The Death of Princess Diana - Tragic Car Accident or Murder Most Foul?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.
programme.sub-title: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A serious investigation of the long-held theory that Elvis Presley faked his death in August 1977. Jokes of Elvis sightings in Kalamazoo aside, there is a considerable volume of evidence to suggest Elvis may not have left the building

programme.title: World War Two: Total War: Unprecedented, Unmerciful and Unrelenting
programme.desc: Each episode looks at a different aspect, starting with an exploration of the portents of total war to come and moving through to preparations for war, followed by invasion, occupation and resistance and how total war enabled the Holocaust.

programme.title: Boy Soldiers
programme.desc: This film recounts the experiences of five boys who found themselves underage, under fire and growing into men as they fought across World War Two's most brutal battlefields.

programme.desc: A construction worker's digger unearths something macabre: a human skull that is 7,000 years old, one of North America's most important archaeological finds.

programme.title: Brothers In Arms

programme.title: 24 Hour Rod Race: River Windrush
programme.desc: This time Matt heads to an old stomping ground – to a hotel with private fishing on the River Windrush – hunting specimen chub. Despite former glories, recent years have seen various issues impact the fishing, so he’ll have his work cut out.

programme.title: 24 Hour Rod Race: The 'Gray' Lady
programme.desc: Matt heads to the famous chalkstreams of Hampshire with Grayling in his sights. But this won’t just be an idyllic fly fishing experience… especially with that hat.

programme.title: 24 Hour Rod Race: Wye Factor
programme.desc: Matt is back for another series of punishing fishing challenges. In the first episode of series two he’s off to the Wye valley for a multi-species hunt. But to make things interesting, he needs one of them to be a game fish.

programme.title: 24 Hour Rod Race: The Trent and Mersey Canal
programme.desc: Matt’s at Kings Bromley Marina on the Trent and Mersey Canal with a double mission – to show that canals can offer top-notch fishing by catching a 3lb+ fish from the network. He’s keen to show just how much fun predator fishing in marinas can be.

programme.title: 24 Hour Rod Race: Dove of hope
programme.desc: Matt heads to a river he’s never fished before – the Dove - and he’s got a serious challenge ahead of him - to catch a 2lb grayling and a 4lb chubb, but the cold weather isn’t going to make things easy for him.

programme.title: 24 Hour Rod Race: Testing Time
programme.desc: To the famous Testwood Fishery this time, with a 2lb roach or a 12oz dace in his targets, either of which would be the fish of a lifetime. Once again the wintery conditions look like making life a bit tricky.

programme.title: 24 Hour Rod Race: Angler's Paradise
programme.desc: Going to be easy. Matt’s got 24 hours to catch 5 of the different ornamental species of fish that old stomping ground holds, but there’s a twist. He’s got to do it on the fly.

programme.title: 24 Hour Rod Race: A Helping Hand
programme.desc: For the first time Matt has some help, as he’s joined by Babs Kijewski, a German carping expert angler from Cologne, but the challenge is doubly hard: they must both catch two carp: one from the top, one from the bottom.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Unhenged
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget's mission is to stop M.A.D. from kidnapping the scientists of the world and holding them for ransom.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Amusement Park
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. agents have hidden a bomb in the amusement park in Metro City. With the bomb set to go off in a halfhour, M.A.D. is holding the city for ransom. Inspector Gadget must find the bomb.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Focus On Gadget
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Dr. Claw, with the help of identical twin MAD scientists Null and Void, steals a space station to extort millions of dollars from the earth's citizens.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Busy Signal
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Claw realizing Gadget isn't dead sends ghosts to kill him. Gadget tries to arrest the ghosts. Agents #1 and #2 are dressed as Ghost Catchers shooting rancid grease all over the mansion.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Funny Money
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. has reduced a counterfeiter to a very tiny size. Inspector Gadget must stop them or they will make millions.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Down On The Farm
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget and Penny heads off on a vacation in the country when they get a frantic call from the Chief that Dr. Claw has stolen an experimental missile.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Dry Spell
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. has stolen all of Metro City's water and plans to hold it for ransom. It is up to Inspector Gadget to recover the missing water.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Curse Of The Pharaoh (Poot-Ta-Foot'S Curse)
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget, Penny and Brain protect the PootTaFoot's treasure from the evil clutches of M.A.D.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pharaoh (Poot-Ta-Foot'S Curse)

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Wambini Predicts
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Chief Quimby warns Inspector Gadget of a MAD plot to steal the famous King of Alpacastan's llama that spits diamonds.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget At The Circus
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. The M.A.D. agents trying to destroy the circus are no match for Inspector Gadget, Penny and Chief Quimby.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: A Star Is Lost
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. A famous rock star, Rick Rocker, is injured while being guarded by Inspector Gadget. While Rick Rocker recovers in the hospital, Inspector Gadget goes on in his place.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Capeman Cometh
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Chief Quimby reveals to Inspector Gadget a MAD plot to steal Metro City's gold. Inspector Gadget is instructed to proceed to the mint and stop the robbery while Penny and Brain follow.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Plantform Of The Opera
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget, Penny and Chief Quimby locate and destroy a secret device of M.A.D. that melts metal.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget's Roma
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. When Quimby learns Thelma is being sent back to ancient Rome to learn the Secret of Roma inscribed on a mosaic at the Forum he sends GADGET to stop her in the time machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget And Old Lace
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. GADGET has ordered a new watch. He gets his orders from Chief Quimby that MAD is unleashing weapons disguised as novelties.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Storms
programme.desc: It’s up to Dr. G to determine if alcohol was to blame for a man's death or if there was a silent killer lurking in his body.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Fatal Flaw
programme.desc: Parents rush their baby to the hospital, but she tragically dies in her mother’s arms. Now, Dr. G must help these devastated parents understand what happened.

programme.title: Exhibit A: Killer Gloves
programme.desc: An intruder breaks into a family home in a well-to-do Calgary neighbourhood. When he’s confronted by the owner, the burglar stabs him to death. The killer flees leaving behind several smudged prints on a window that appear to be left by a pair of gloves.

programme.title: Exhibit A: Dead Sea
programme.desc: A fisherman, trawling off the English coast, comes upon what appears to be a large fish in his net. But it turns out to be a dead body. The body is wearing shoes and a Rolex watch, but has no I.D. – is it murder or suicide?

programme.title: Exhibit A: The Trouble With Susan
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing. It takes nearly 2 weeks for the police to determine that this is no missing person case. The homicide squad slowly amasses enough evidence to charge a man with murder even though the victim’s body still has not been found.

programme.title: Exhibit A: Stopwatch Gang
programme.desc: In 1974, this band of gentlemanly bank robbers from Canada stole $700,000 in gold bricks from a storage warehouse at Ottawa International Airport. It was and still is Canada’s biggest-ever gold robbery.

programme.title: Exhibit A: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: In this case, a forensic scientist misinterprets the facts surrounding a shooting, thereby allowing the guilty party to walk free. But the victim’s mother won’t let the case rest. Eventually she gathers enough evidence to reopen the case

programme.title: Exhibit A
programme.desc: A serial rapist in Lafayette, Louisiana is finally caught thanks to a local investigator and a Canadian forensic scientist, who developed “geographic profiling.” This analytical tool helps investigators figure out where a serial criminal lives.

programme.title: Exhibit A: Time Bomb
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in a postal truck in downtown Toronto. A security camera records the reaction of the burning postal driver. His trauma is so severe, he is put in an induced coma. Who set the bomb? Who was the target?

programme.title: Exhibit A: North Bay
programme.desc: An exhaustive 18-month investigation follows the murder of a young woman in North Bay. The prime suspect’s DNA matches that on the woman’s clothes. In a startling development, further DNA tests prove the wrong man has been charged.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: A young mother is fooled into handing her baby to a stranger, and watches in horror as they disappear. Why has the woman taken her child, and can the FBI find her before it’s too late?

programme.title: Beyond Earth
programme.desc: Shot over eight years and with unprecedented access, Beyond Earth: The Beginning of NewSpace, is a journey into space exploration with leading astropreneurs that shows us what is in store for mankind.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: From There to Here
programme.desc: The sky above is studded with stars and countless galaxies. In them, we can read not only our origin, but also our final destination. Technology is on the brink of taking us to places we have only dreamed of.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. It lights our night sky and gently tugs at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between our planet and our star. Mercury and Venus make up half of our terrestrial planets, but we still know very little about them. As we take a closer look at our companions, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: Mars has fired our imagination for thousands of years. The tantilizing possibility of life has made it the most inviting planet in our solar system. It is the only other place that man may one day call home.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our solar system 4.5 billions years ago, there remain many clues to reveal its evolution. Remnant debris, asteroids, and comets are what's left of the building blocks to our celestial neighborhood.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Gas Giants
programme.desc: In the cold, dark expanse of our solar system, beyond the asteroid belt, lie the giant planets. Some can be seen with the naked eye, others have been visited by our camera. What secrets do they hold?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympus
programme.desc: There are many more worlds in our solar system than just the planets. The mysterious moons of the gas giants may hold much more than we ever imagined. Each one is unique, and each one deserves a scrutinous eye.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe, the further back in time we reach. Most of what we see is actually dark matter and dark energy, but its nature eludes us ... for the moment.

programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 1

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 2

programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 2

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: Round the Clock

programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: Round the Clock

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.
programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: And Then There Were None

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Oh Brother, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cap and Gown
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ball in the Family
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Alan in Charge
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Renaissance Men
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Heroes Welcome
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a color run to bring awareness to our wounded soldiers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Pie Hard
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Van He'llsing
programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices. Meanwhile, Willie helps Jep prepare River for a competitive wrestling league by introducing him to his friend.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Toad to Perdition
programme.desc: When Willie and his brothers spend too much time frog hunting, their wives challenge them to a "frogging" competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: RV There Yet?
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie & Korie's Anniversorry
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Statue of Imitations
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject - Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: On a trip to New York, Jase's son Reed proposes to his girlfriend, which inspires his father to fan the flames of romance back home with Missy. Meanwhile, Sadie asks Willie to be a guest lecturer at her business class.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Father Knows Pest
programme.desc: The tables are turned when the HOA comes to Jase for help to rid the neighborhood of a menacing beaver. Little Will has just gotten his learner's permit, and Willie and Si argue over which of them is the better driving instructor.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Wild Wild West Monroe
programme.desc: When Jase and Jep get into an argument over which of them is the rightful heir to their grandfather's old rifle, they decide to settle the argument with a marksmanship contest. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie help Rebecca prepare for her trip to Taiwan.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A jackknifed HGV has blocked a lane of traffic.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6

programme.title: Ax Men: The Log and Winding Road
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Shelby and his assistant Bob head out looking for logs on his newly repaired two-ton swamp buggy. In Central Florida, the Chapman crew goes to battle against the legendary "Gump" log - the biggest challenge of their career.

programme.title: Ax Men: Swamp Man Boogie
programme.desc: Deep in the Bayou, Shelby hits Lake Ponchartrain with Belinda and Bob to retrieve a massive log he marked years ago. In Florida, it's round two between Chapman and the legendary Gump log.

programme.title: Ax Men: Teepee of Death
programme.desc: In Washington, Rygaard's remaining veterans go old school to keep the team on track. Deep in the Bayou, Shelby and Bob discover a valuable sinker cypress, but reeling it in is easier said then done.

programme.title: Ax Men: Old Log New Tricks
programme.desc: In the Louisiana Bayou, Shelby Stanga's jet boat is in desperate need of repair and he needs to find logs to buy a new engine.

programme.title: Ax Men: All's Fair in Loggin' War
programme.desc: Down in the swamps of Louisiana, Shelby Stanga is trying to upgrade his logging empire, so he takes a risk and tries out some new equipment.

programme.title: Ax Men: Don't Cross The Boss
programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Rygaard logging has begun to claw its way back up the log count thanks to DJ Jeremiah, but today he's a no show.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court: One Door Closes
programme.desc: Is this contractor crooked as a bent nail or is this homeowner's behavior in need of renovations... Find out how Judge Karen hammers for the truth.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court: On The Road
programme.desc: Darious claims his cousin barged into his car on a cross-country trip, got caught speeding, borrowed money to go to clubs, and allowed a neighbor to move her stuff into his home. Donald insists that his cousin never expected any of the money back.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court: Car Troubles
programme.desc: Plaintiff, Reprudentia, is suing a fellow Cameroonian countryman for the $5000 she gave him to buy her a car. Kuji says he got her the car she wanted but was unable to contact her in order to make delivery.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: She Said, She Said

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Peek-A-Boo Painter
programme.desc: The defendant simply wanted her house painted, and the plaintiff claims, she was out to paint the town. Watch as these colorful litigants stand off!

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: A Pudding Proposal
programme.desc: This episode features a dynamic duo, duling over a diamond in the rough. He says when the money ran out, so did she. These two are caught between a rock and a hard place.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: A Pain in My Glass
programme.desc: In this episode, a child's baseball hits issues that seems black and white. What should've been an open and shut case was anything but!

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Honeymoon Came Early
programme.desc: A bitter bride stirs a feud with her maid of dishonor one night before the wedding. It seems monogamy was not on the mind of the would-be groom.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Company Cabaret
programme.desc: A former employee complains that her employer turned the workplace into a raunchy club! He claims she was a poor performer, but she says she didn't sign up for this kind of show!

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Mischievous Mover
programme.desc: A woman asks for a hand while moving her apartment, but what she got was a five finger discount that lifted everything in her possession. The defendant says he handled the situation with gloves, and that she's the one with meddling mittens.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Troubled Teen
programme.desc: We'll meet an emotional mom and her troubled teen as they battle over the Stilton family jewels. Mom says she tried everything to put the reigns on her wayward daughter, but the daughter refuses to be broken.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Bad Seed
programme.desc: A couple of bubbly botanists turn bankers after loaning their hired help money for a higher education. The defendant, however, cultivated the cash for purposes other than class.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Distracted Drivers
programme.desc: A pair of distracted drivers wrestle over their right-of-way. Each claims to have seen green as they drove into their destination of disaster.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Splish Your Frock
programme.desc: Tiffany claims Kendra intentionally spilled a glass of red wine on her white dress. Kendra says she was merely trying to get back to her seat. Defendant says Tiffany had no business being in that section, therefore she owes her nothing.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Not My Corona
programme.desc: Helen is suing her neighbor, Justin, for giving her COVID-19. She says Justin ignored the rules posted in their building and entered the laundry room without a mask. Justin says he had not been diagnosed with COVID and did not have any symptoms.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Fit Flirter
programme.desc: Jenny says Luke owes her for training sessions for which she has already paid. Luke says Jenny was sexually inappropriate during their sessions, claiming she violated their working etiquette which broke their contract, therefore he owes her nothing.
